laws.title: Public Law 18-139 | The Bye Bye Background Checks Act
laws.status_basis: The source text is recoverable and Section 2 expressly repeals Public Law 17-137; the remaining provisions are standard note material and the act does not require a new positive-law section.

current_implementation.detail: The branch XML has 2 U.S.C. 6132, but no PL-018-139 statutory note or repeal-history entry appears in the current tree, and the origin/main baseline does not add one either.

source_evidence: codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-018-139.md classifies the act as STATUTORY_NOTE at 2 U.S.C. 6132.
codification/mass_migration/latest/sources/records/PL-018-139.json identifies the PDF source and a 1212-character text extraction.
codification/laws/laws/PL-018-139/law.txt states that Public Law 17-137 shall be repealed in its entirety.
recommended_actions: Add a concise statutory note at 2 U.S.C. 6132 recording the repeal of PL 17-137.
Do not add substantive Code text.
Remove any dump or Trello material if present in the working note.
